ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)

ingredients_text: Greek style yoghurt (79%)[Milk, cream (milk), sugar, skim milk powder, lactic starter culture (milk)(including streptococcus thermophilus, lactobacillus caser)], honey granola (12%)(rolled oats, honey, coconut chips, sultanas, pepitas, sunflow kernels, sunflower oil, cinnamon), raspberry preparation (7%)[raspberries, raspberry juice, sugar, raspberry puree, water, stabiliser (440), black carrot extract, concentrated blackcurrant juice, milk, solids, lemon juice concentrate, flavours]
